en_title: Lords of the Fallen 2 Delayed to 2027
subtitle: 避开神仙打架
opus_summary: CI Games宣布《堕落之王2》由原计划2026年秋季推迟至2027年初发售，以进一步打磨品质、避开《侠盗猎车手6》《现代战争4》等拉满的竞争档期。游戏尚无确切日期，2027年初已成延期待售大作汇聚地。

paragraphs.en: Lords of the Fallen 2 will no longer release this year, as the game has been pushed to early 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 《堕落之王2》将不再于今年发售，该作已推迟至2027年初。

paragraphs.en: CI Games CEO Marek Tyminski confirmed that Lords of the Fallen 2 will miss its fall 2026 release window in favor of refining and strengthening the game.
paragraphs.cn: CI Games首席执行官Marek Tyminski确认，《堕落之王2》将错过2026年秋季发售窗口，以进一步打磨和强化游戏。

paragraphs.en: "As development progresses, we have worked closely with the Gameplay Feedback Team, a dedicated group of seasoned Souls-like veterans within our Launch Creative Team," he said. "Their valuable ongoing input, combined with the team’s vision, has identified meaningful opportunities to further refine and strengthen the overall experience. These enhancements will benefit from additional integration, iteration, and polishing time, enabling the team to deliver the highest possible quality at launch."
paragraphs.cn: 「随着开发推进，我们与发行创意团队中由资深魂系老手组成的游戏反馈小组紧密合作，」他表示，「他们持续提供的宝贵意见，结合团队的愿景，帮助我们找出了进一步打磨和强化整体体验的重要机会。这些改进将受益于额外的集成、迭代和打磨时间，让团队在发售时呈现尽可能高的品质。」

paragraphs.en: However, Tyminski also noted that the game will benefit from avoiding the onslaught of releases this fall. Currently, September 2026 is stacked with gaming releases , as publishers try to avoid the blast radius of Grand Theft Auto 6 in November. Major titles like Silent Hill: Townfall, Control Resonant, and Onimusha: Way of the Sword are all releasing in September, while some other games like Valor Mortis have pivoted to October for some breathing room. However, October also has steep competition with games like Modern Warfare 4.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，Tyminski也指出，避开今年秋季的新作狂潮对游戏有利。目前，2026年9月游戏发售排得满满当当，发行商们都试图躲开11月《侠盗猎车手6》的爆炸冲击范围。《寂静岭：汤恩福尔》、《控制：共振》和《鬼武者：剑之道》等大作都将在9月发售，而像《Valor Mortis》等其他作品则转向10月以求喘息空间。但10月同样面临《现代战争4》等游戏的激烈竞争。

paragraphs.en: "This updated release window also strategically positions Lords of the Fallen 2 outside of a highly competitive holiday period, ensuring the game receives the dedicated attention it deserves," Tyminski continued. "The team remains fully energized by the strong response to our recent reveals and is deeply focused on delivering a standout dark fantasy action RPG and a worthy successor to the Lords of the Fallen franchise. We are grateful for the continued passion, feedback, and support from our community, and we look forward to sharing more updates in the coming months."
paragraphs.cn: 「将发售窗口调整至此，也让我们在竞争激烈的假日档期之外获得了更有利的位置，确保游戏能得到应有的关注，」Tyminski继续说道，「玩家对我们近期展示内容的强烈反响让团队充满干劲，我们将全力以赴，打造一款出众的黑暗奇幻动作RPG，成为《堕落之王》系列名副其实的继承者。感谢社区的持续热情、反馈与支持，我们期待在未来数月分享更多消息。」

paragraphs.en: Currently, Lords of the Fallen 2 has no firm release date. Early 2027 is also becoming a hot spot for delayed 2026 games. Fable recently abandoned plans for a 2026 release to avoid competition, and it wouldn't be surprising if some other games follow suit.
paragraphs.cn: 《堕落之王2》目前尚未确定具体发售日期。2027年初正成为2026年延期游戏的热门档期。《神鬼寓言》近期放弃了2026年发售计划以避竞争，若还有其他游戏效仿，也毫不令人意外。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、影视等各类娱乐内容。你可以在X上找到他 @Cade_Onder。
